rss.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue strikes despite ceasefire agreement
rss.snippet: Deaths are reported in southern Lebanon, with the IDF saying it hit "Hezbollah terrorist targets" after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces.

rss.title: Zelensky stripped of highest Polish honour over WW2 name of army unit
rss.snippet: Ukraine has denounced the move, calling it a "strategic mistake" and "disrespectful".

rss.title: Tourist dies in Dominican Republic luxury resort fire
rss.snippet: Nearly 1,700 people were evacuated from the huge blaze at Viva Wyndham Dominicus Beach in Bayahibe, a popular resort town on the Caribbean coast.

github_repos.title: obsei/obsei
github_repos.snippet: Obsei is a low code AI powered automation tool. It can be used in various business flows like social listening, AI based alerting, brand image analysis, comparative study and more .

github_repos.snippet: A list of Twitter datasets and related resources.

arxiv_papers.title: Networks of agglomeration: how population density rewires social networks and reshapes contagion dynamics
arxiv_papers.snippet: From ancient Mesopotamia to modern cities, dense human settlements coincide with bursts of economic productivity, cultural innovation, and social change. arxiv_papers.title: Opinion Polarization in LLM-Based Social Networks: Manipulation and Mitigation
arxiv_papers.snippet: How vulnerable are online social networks to adversaries who seek to amplify opinion polarization by manipulating opinions, and how difficult is it to mitigate such manipulation? podcast: [The real horror of ‘Alien’ and how it explains why we’re not paid enough] Maybe the real monster in the Alien franchise isn’t actually the killer alien. Because behind the acid blood and jump scares is an even more insidious horror: a single employer with unchecked power.
